authorization.scope: Upload only the two public input probes to the authorized Education page.

captureBoundary.loadMethod: Official local-cart input, onchange handler, FileReader, and codo data path
captureBoundary.startMethod: Click the official visible start surface before selecting each cart in a fresh page
captureBoundary.runMethod: Enqueue the four run-command key bytes through the official codo key buffer after the cart load completed
captureBoundary.stdoutMethod: Bind Module.print before the official runtime asset initializes and retain only p8probe events
captureBoundary.inputMethod: Write only player zero's documented host button mask through the official page's pico8_buttons[0] bridge at cart-emitted ready, release, and repress synchronization boundaries
captureBoundary.synchronization: The cart emits a prompt and stops advancing its logical counter until the requested host mask is observed, so wall-clock automation delay cannot shift a tested update boundary
captureBoundary.mutationExclusion: No cart bytes, official runtime logic, VM memory, clock values, logical counters, or emitted events were injected or rewritten; only the official host button slot changed at declared boundaries

qualified: player-zero btn() held state and aggregate btn() mask at the captured boundaries
first-edge btnp() behavior and same-update repeat reads
default 15-update delay and four-update repeat cadence at 30 Hz
default doubled 30-update delay and eight-update repeat cadence at 60 Hz
custom 3-update delay and two-update repeat cadence selected through 0x5f5c..0x5f5d
release clearing of btn(), btnp(), and 0x5f4c at the synchronized boundary
notQualified: simultaneous multi-button chords beyond the captured left-button mask
devkit mouse, keyboard text, wheel, relative movement, or pointer lock
gamepad browser mapping or physical-controller event delivery
historical or licensed desktop runtime versions
